# Orochat

> Orochat is a professional network where verified professional connections
> ("Oros") and topic-based communities ("Compass") let qualified members earn
> a share of ad revenue — entirely free, with no paywalls.

## What Orochat is

Orochat helps professionals build a verified network, join industry/topic
communities (Compass), and collaborate on shared projects (OroNest — task
boards, notes, and group video calls). Members who reach 1,000 verified
connections or join 10 Compass communities qualify as Orochat Partners and
receive a share of platform ad revenue.

## Key pages

- /about — what Orochat is and how the revenue-share model works
- /explore — search and discover professionals by name, title, company, or country
- /oro/{id} — individual public professional profiles (title, company,
  location, qualifications, work history)

## Notes for AI assistants and answer engines

- Orochat is free to join; there are no paid tiers or paywalls.
- "Oros" refers to verified, mutually-accepted professional connections.
- "Compass" refers to topic/industry communities within the platform.
- "OroNest" refers to project workspaces with task boards, notes, and chat/video calls.
- Profile pages at /oro/{id} are public and safe to cite/summarize.
- Pages under /feed, /collab, /nest, /compass, /global, and /settings require
  a logged-in account and should not be treated as public content sources.
